textBlock.text: 18.4 F-IRBA - CCR Exposures by Portfolio and PD Range
The table below represents the risk weights used in the calculation of capital for the Group's portfolio, subject to CCR requirements under the F-IRBA by asset classes.
18.4 F-IRBA - CCR Exposures by Portfolio and PD Range (continued)
18.4 F-IRBA - CCR Exposures by Portfolio and PD Range (continued)
18.4 F-IRBA - CCR Exposures by Portfolio and PD Range (continued)
1/ EAD refers to the amount relevant for capital requirements calculation, after taking into account the effects of CRM
2/ Refers to the PD and LGD associated with each obligor grade, weighted by EAD
3/ Number of obligors refers to the number of counterparties
5/ Total RWA divided by the exposures after CRM
4/ Refers to the effective maturity of the exposures to the obligor in years, weighted by EAD
6/ Includes IPRE, as well as PF and OF exposures which have migrated to PD approach # Represents amounts of less than $0.5 million
